scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl tracking-tight uppercase

buttons.primary: bg-[#DC1F26] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-[#B9181F] transition-all hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(220,31,38,0.4)] flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-[#1EBE5D] transition-all hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(37,211,102,0.4)] flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#DC1F26] text-[#DC1F26] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-[#DC1F26] hover:text-white transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2

product_card.container: group relative overflow-hidden bg-[#121212] border border-white/5 rounded-xl transition-all duration-300 hover:border-[#DC1F26]/50 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(220,31,38,0.15)] flex flex-col h-full
product_card.image_wrapper: relative aspect-square overflow-hidden bg-[#F5F4F0] p-6 flex items-center justify-center
product_card.image: object-contain w-full h-full mix-blend-multiply group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500
product_card.badge: absolute top-4 left-4 bg-black/80 text-white text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-1 rounded backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 z-10
product_card.hover_overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 z-20

gallery_card.container: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl aspect-[4/5] bg-[#121212]
gallery_card.image: w-full h-full object-cover group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-700
gallery_card.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 via-black/40 to-transparent opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300 flex flex-col justify-end p-6
gallery_card.contact_text: text-white text-xl font-bold mb-2 translate-y-4 group-hover:translate-y-0 transition-transform duration-300
gallery_card.whatsapp_btn: bg-[#25D366] text-white w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-[#1EBE5D] transition-colors translate-y-4 group-hover:translate-y-0 transition-transform duration-300 delay-75

header.container: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 border-b border-white/10 py-4 transition-all
header.logo: font-['Anton'] text-3xl italic tracking-wider flex items-center gap-1
header.nav_links: hidden md:flex items-center gap-8 text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-[#A3A3A3] hover:text-white transition-colors

motion.page_load: staggered fade-up, elements translate-y-8 to 0, opacity 0 to 1 over 0.6s ease-out
motion.hover: smooth transform scales (1.05 to 1.1), subtle glow reveals, 300ms ease
motion.marquee: slow continuous horizontal scroll for 'Why Choose Us' or client logos

images.description: Black dumbbells on a black rack.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure global dark mode by setting body bg to #0A0A0A and text to #F5F5F5.
Do NOT display any prices. Use 'Contact for Price' and WhatsApp CTA.

For product images, use the cream-background images (or mock them if missing). Place them inside the product_card.image_wrapper. Set mix-blend-multiply if applicable, otherwise let the cream background act as a high-contrast striking box within the dark card.
Use Anton for all headings (H1-H6) and uppercase them for a strong, athletic, modern aesthetic.
Use DM Sans for body text to maintain clean readability.
Implement Lucide React icons for the WhatsApp logo (or use an SVG) and other UI elements.
Float a WhatsApp button at the bottom right corner with a subtle pulsing shadow.
The Hero overlay should use bg-gradient-to-r from-black/80 to-black/30 so text is readable while the cinematic gym background remains visible.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for testing.
